name: rosehill-college-site
description: Rosehill College — cinematic scroll website. Static Vite build structured for WordPress port.

scripts.build: node scripts/gen-image-variants.mjs && node scripts/gen-cms-config.mjs && node scripts/render.mjs && vite build && node scripts/inline-css.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run build:deploy && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name rosehill-college
